<?php namespace Knuckles\Scribe\Extracting\Strategies\Headers; use Knuckles\Camel\Extraction\ExtractedEndpointData; use Knuckles\Scribe\Attributes\Header; use Knuckles\Scribe\Extracting\Strategies\PhpAttributeStrategy; /** * @extends PhpAttributeStrategy<Header> */ class GetFromHeaderAttribute extends PhpAttributeStrategy { protected static array $attributeNames = [Header::class]; protected function extractFromAttributes( ExtractedEndpointData $endpointData, array $attributesOnMethod, array $attributesOnFormRequest = [], array $attributesOnController = [] ): ?array { $headers = []; foreach ([...$attributesOnController, ...$attributesOnFormRequest, ...$attributesOnMethod] as $attributeInstance) { $data = $attributeInstance->toArray(); $data['example'] ??= $this->generateDummyValue('string'); $headers[$data["name"]] = $data["example"]; } return $headers; } }
